title: lobelia trullifolia subsp. pinnatifida
intro: Lobelia trullifolia subsp. pinnatifida, also known as Lobelia, is a plant species belonging to the family Campanulaceae, commonly found in the alpine regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Lobelia trullifolia subsp. pinnatifida include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Lobelia trullifolia subsp. pinnatifida can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to alleviate coughs and other respiratory problems.
